metadata.description: Flutter + Bloc state-management skills for Claude Code — setup, feature pattern, async API, real-time streams, testing, and forms. Opinionated toward a Laravel backend.

plugins.name: flutter-bloc-skills
plugins.description: Six proactive skills for production-quality Flutter apps using Bloc — setup, feature scaffolding, async API with typed Failure mapping, real-time streams via emit.forEach, deterministic Bloc tests, and forms with per-field 422 error round-trip. Each skill activates automatically on relevant phrases.
